title: CubesideUtilsFabricClient
description: Some utilities for fabric client mods
body:
# CubesideUtilsFabricClient

## Overview

CubesideUtilsFabricClient is a utility mod designed for the Fabric modding framework. This mod provides a variety of useful tools and utilities, such as Command Utils, String Utils, and many more. It is intended to enhance the development and functionality of numerous mods for and by Cubeside.

## Features

- **Command Utils**: Simplify command creation and management within your mods.
- **String Utils**: A collection of string manipulation functions to make working with text easier.
- **Additional Utilities**: A range of other helpful utilities to streamline your modding experience.

## Installation

1. Ensure you have the Fabric Mod Loader installed.
2. Download the latest version of CubesideUtilsFabricClient from the [releases page](https://modrinth.com/project/cubesideutilsfabricclient/versions).
3. Place the downloaded `.jar` file into your `mods` folder.
